purpose: Endpoints intentionally public (no role binding required). INV-RBAC-001 clause (c): satisfying the invariant via allow-list rather than role binding or `auth.required=false` claim. Each entry MUST cite a justification.

entries.justification: Reference dev-auth endpoint for the reference application. Verifies a STYNX-issued bearer token without requiring an authenticated session. Marked @Public per @stynx-nyx/auth contract; intentionally exempt from RBAC binding.

Reference dev-auth login that mints session tokens for the reference web app. Public by definition (pre-auth endpoint). Marked @Public + @NoIdempotent per @stynx-nyx/auth + @stynx-nyx/idempotency contracts.
Reference endpoint listing demo tenants the dev-login flow can mint sessions for. Pre-auth listing; safe by design (only demo-tenant metadata surfaced).

_devai_gap_note: These entries SHOULD be detected automatically by sense-api recognizing the @Public() decorator (filed as D-A-12 for the next devai alignment session). Until then, this allow-list is the documentary closure mechanism for INV-RBAC-001 known violations. The candidate count from `inv-suggest` will not drop until D-A-12 closes; this file establishes the per-stynx convention for the closure.
